meta.purpose: PPT arrow asset pack 02 gradient main-chain arrows for page-level process, flow, convergence, split, bridge, vertical, trend, and return relations.

sources.summary: Pick for a low-profile reference arrow spanning several blocks with minimal visual weight. Skip for stronger bridge arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_bridge_arc_path).
Pick for a long rightward block arrow showing main chain movement, migration, or target push. Skip for chevron-tail emphasis (use pptpack2_gradient_chevron_flag_right).
Pick for a long leftward block arrow showing return, reverse flow, or backtracking. Skip for U-turn return flows (use pptpack2_gradient_return_u_turn_band).
Pick for a wide bidirectional bar showing mutual exchange or two-sided relation. Skip for crossing exchange (use pptpack2_gradient_cross_exchange_band).
Pick for a slim rightward process spine when the arrow should guide a sequence without dominating. Skip for wide banner arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for a wide banner arrow with a cut tail, suitable for strong section headers or left-cut process ribbons. Skip for neutral slim paths (use pptpack2_gradient_slim_process_spine_arrow).
Pick for a strong rightward chevron-flag arrow that reads as a main path or push. Skip for multi-step chains (use pptpack2_gradient_4_step_tight_chevron).
Pick for a leftward chevron-flag arrow indicating return, rollback, or reverse flow. Skip for bidirectional exchange (use pptpack2_gradient_double_ended_bar_arrow).
Pick for a compact two-step chevron process. Skip for three or more steps (use pptpack2_gradient_3_step_tight_chevron).
Pick for a compact three-step chevron process. Skip for four-step chains (use pptpack2_gradient_4_step_tight_chevron).
Pick for a compact four-step chevron process. Skip for five-step chains (use pptpack2_gradient_5_step_tight_chevron).
Pick for a compact five-step chevron process. Skip for six-step chains (use pptpack2_gradient_6_step_tight_chevron).
Pick for a compact six-step chevron process when many small phases must fit. Skip for larger stage blocks (use pptpack_gradient_process_chevron_4_steps).
Pick for a four-stage overlapping chain where stages should feel continuous and interlocked. Skip for separated chevrons (use pptpack2_gradient_4_step_tight_chevron).
Pick for a horizontal channel with a central rise, showing uplift or emergence from a main path. Skip for vertical standalone growth (use pptpack2_gradient_vertical_up_flow).
Pick for a horizontal channel with a central drop, showing handoff, landing, or downstream delivery. Skip for vertical standalone down flow (use pptpack2_gradient_vertical_down_flow).
Pick for a soft bridge arc spanning a foundation or cross-layer relation. Skip for low-profile reference arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_low_profile_reference_arrow).
Pick for a platform peak or central capability rising from a baseline. Skip for center-rise channels with broader path continuity (use pptpack2_gradient_center_rise_path).
Pick for left-side inputs narrowing into a rightward outcome. Skip for three-stream convergence (use pptpack2_gradient_three_streams_converge).
Pick for right-side inputs narrowing into a leftward outcome or reverse consolidation. Skip for plain leftward movement (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_left_arrow).
Pick for three streams converging into one rightward output. Skip for only two inputs (use pptpack2_gradient_funnel_converge_right).
Pick for one path splitting into three downstream outputs. Skip for two-way branching (use pptpack2_gradient_diverging_fork_arrow).
Pick for a central bidirectional exchange band between two sides. Skip for crossed interaction (use pptpack2_gradient_cross_exchange_band).
Pick for crossing two-way exchange, mutual transformation, or crossing dependencies. Skip for simple bidirectional relation (use pptpack2_gradient_bidirectional_exchange_band).
Pick for a strong vertical upward flow or lift. Skip for stacked chevron up progression (use pptpack2_gradient_vertical_chevron_stack_up).
Pick for a strong vertical downward flow or deployment. Skip for stacked chevron down progression (use pptpack2_gradient_vertical_chevron_stack_down).
Pick for a vertical stack of upward chevrons showing staged uplift. Skip for one large upward arrow (use pptpack2_gradient_vertical_up_flow).
Pick for a vertical stack of downward chevrons showing staged rollout or drill-down. Skip for one large downward arrow (use pptpack2_gradient_vertical_down_flow).
Pick for diagonal upward trend or breakthrough movement. Skip for vertical growth (use pptpack2_gradient_vertical_up_flow).
Pick for diagonal downward trend, decline, or controlled reduction. Skip for vertical deployment (use pptpack2_gradient_vertical_down_flow).
Pick for rightward flow that turns upward into escalation, uplift, or target capability. Skip for pure up arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_vertical_up_flow).
Pick for rightward flow that turns downward into landing, implementation, or delivery. Skip for pure down arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_vertical_down_flow).
Pick for a wide U-turn return band showing loop-back, correction, or iterative return. Skip for connector feedback routes (use pptpack4_connector_route_41).
Pick for a layered low-profile arrow with subtle shadow, useful as a reference or supporting bridge. Skip for stronger main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for a stepped platform arrow showing maturity climb, staged advance, or platform progression. Skip for flat chevron chains (use pptpack2_gradient_4_step_tight_chevron).
Pick for simple straight connector lines between nodes; tags: connector, line, route, straight, right, line. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for simple straight connector lines between nodes; tags: connector, line, route, straight, left, line. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for simple straight connector lines between nodes; tags: connector, line, route, double, straight, line. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for orthogonal elbow connector routes between boxes or architecture layers; tags: connector, line, route, elbow, right, down. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for orthogonal elbow connector routes between boxes or architecture layers; tags: connector, line, route, elbow, right, up. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for orthogonal elbow connector routes between boxes or architecture layers; tags: connector, line, route, elbow, down, right. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for orthogonal elbow connector routes between boxes or architecture layers; tags: connector, line, route, elbow, up, right. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for curved connector lines between nodes or layers; tags: connector, line, route, soft, curve, right. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for curved connector lines between nodes or layers; tags: connector, line, route, soft, curve, down. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for curved connector lines between nodes or layers; tags: connector, line, route, soft, curve, up. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for curved connector lines between nodes or layers; tags: connector, line, route, s, curve, right. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for curved connector lines between nodes or layers; tags: connector, line, route, s, curve, left. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for curved connector lines between nodes or layers; tags: connector, line, route, arc, up, right. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for curved connector lines between nodes or layers; tags: connector, line, route, arc, down, right. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for split, merge, return, loop-back, or branching connector logic; tags: connector, line, route, loop, clockwise. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for split, merge, return, loop-back, or branching connector logic; tags: connector, line, route, loop, counterclockwise. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for split, merge, return, loop-back, or branching connector logic; tags: connector, line, route, return, left. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for split, merge, return, loop-back, or branching connector logic; tags: connector, line, route, return, right. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for split, merge, return, loop-back, or branching connector logic; tags: connector, line, route, split, line, two. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for split, merge, return, loop-back, or branching connector logic; tags: connector, line, route, merge, line, two. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for split, merge, return, loop-back, or branching connector logic; tags: connector, line, route, split, line, three. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

Pick for split, merge, return, loop-back, or branching connector logic; tags: connector, line, route, merge, line, three. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for simple straight connector lines between nodes; tags: connector, line, route, dashed, process, right. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).
Pick for curved connector lines between nodes or layers; tags: connector, line, route, bidirectional, curve. Skip for wide filled main-chain arrows (use pptpack2_gradient_long_block_right_arrow).

deferred.reason: flat duplicates gradient shapes; keep outside runtime index unless editable-flat variants are explicitly needed
outline variants are lower-impact placeholders and duplicate main-chain structure
